"pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Planned Work 
￼ Jamaica Center-bound trains skip Hewes St, Lorimer St and Flushing Av
￼ Middle Village-bound trains skip Hewes St, Lorimer St and Flushing Av

Days, 9:45 AM to 3 PM, Thu and Fri, Mar 30 - 31

For service to these stations, take the ￼ or ￼ to Myrtle Av and transfer to a
Manhattan-bound ￼ or ￼.

For service from these stations, take the ￼ or ￼ to Essex St* and transfer to a
Jamaica Center-bound ￼ or Middle Village-bound ￼.

*Transfer at Marcy Av with Unlimited Ride MetroCard.

Alternate travel note:
Take the B46 bus via transfer at Marcy Av or Myrtle Av.

￼ This service change affects one or more ADA accessible stations. Please call 511 for help with planning
your trip. If you are deaf or hard of hearing, use your preferred relay service provider or the free 711 relay.

￼ Middle Village-bound trains skip Hewes St, Lorimer St and Flushing Av
